summary: Comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ expanded employee onboarding (ALL roles) and HR document management system. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin Create Employee modal works with 7 roles, HR Dashboard shows stats for all employee types with role badges and doc counts (X/7), HR Employee Detail page shows 7-item document checklist with upload/verify buttons.

issues: Finance, Operations, Marketing roles not in roleDashboards map - they redirect to '/' after login instead of a dashboard. However, onboarding intercept still works when accessing protected routes.

backend.test: POST /api/admin/create-employee with role=hr creates HR employee
POST /api/admin/create-employee with role=finance creates Finance employee
POST /api/admin/create-employee with role=operations creates Operations employee
POST /api/admin/create-employee with role=marketing creates Marketing employee
POST /api/admin/create-employee with role=event_planner creates Event Planner employee
POST /api/admin/create-employee with role=venue_owner creates Venue Owner employee
POST /api/admin/create-employee with invalid role returns 400
POST /api/admin/create-employee duplicate email returns 400

frontend.test: Admin Users page shows 'Create Employee' button (not 'Create RM')
Create Employee modal has role dropdown with all 7 roles
Modal shows Full Name, Email, Temporary Password fields
Modal shows 'What happens next?' workflow explanation

backend.test: GET /api/hr/dashboard returns stats for ALL managed employee types
Stats include total_staff, pending_verifications, verified, rejected, profile_incomplete, docs_pending, docs_verified

frontend.test: HR Dashboard shows 4 stat cards (Pending, Verified, Rejected, Incomplete)
Stats cards are clickable to filter employee list
Employee cards show role badges (RM, HR, Finance, etc.)

backend.test: GET /api/hr/staff returns all managed roles
GET /api/hr/staff?role=hr filters by HR role
GET /api/hr/staff?role=rm filters by RM role
Staff includes doc counts per employee (docs_uploaded, docs_verified, docs_total_required)

frontend.test: Employee detail page shows profile card with status badge (PENDING/VERIFIED)
Profile card shows role label (Hr, Finance, etc.)
Profile card shows email, phone, address, emergency contact
Approve Employee and Reject buttons visible for pending employees
Document progress shows X/7 verified count
Upload button present for each document type

backend.test: GET /api/hr/document-types returns 7 document types
POST /api/hr/employee/{user_id}/documents uploads a document (base64)
GET /api/hr/employee/{user_id}/documents returns 7-item checklist
PATCH /api/hr/employee/{user_id}/documents/{doc_id} marks document as verified
DELETE /api/hr/employee/{user_id}/documents/{doc_id} removes document
Re-upload same doc_type replaces existing document and resets status to pending
Non-RM employee (HR) login blocked after profile complete with 403 (pending verification)

action_items: MINOR: Add finance, operations, marketing to roleDashboards in LoginPage.js for proper redirect after login (currently they fall back to '/')

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All UI flows work correctly, minor redirect issue for new roles

seed_data_creation: Test employees created during testing with TEST_ prefix (TEST_hr_*, TEST_finance_*, TEST_operations_*, TEST_marketing_*, TEST_docmgmt_*, TEST_logingate_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee onboarding system expanded to all 7 managed roles (rm, hr, venue_owner, event_planner, finance, operations, marketing). HR document management has 7-item checklist. Admin creates employee → Employee logs in, changes password, completes profile → HR uploads documents & verifies → HR approves → Employee can login. Backend 100% working. Frontend works except minor redirect issue for new roles (finance/ops/marketing go to '/' instead of dashboard after login - onboarding still works when accessing protected routes). Test employees prefixed with TEST_.
